articles.title: Knight: 'Wanted to give my all this summer but right time to step away'

articles.title: Lennox stars with five wickets as New Zealand level ODI series
articles.description: West Indies lost all ten wickets for 75 on a tricky pitch before the visitors overcame some wobbles in the chase

articles.title: Hetmyer replaces injured Greaves for second and third NZ ODIs
articles.description: Hetmyer had earlier been left out of their squad for the first three ODIs to allow him to complete his MLC stint

articles.title: BBL returns to Christmas Eve, Australia Day final
articles.description: Christmas Day remains free of BBL action but the final will be played on January 26

articles.title: McCullum fronts up one last time after becoming Bazball's fall guy

articles.title: Women's cricket shortchanged again as men's Test binfire sucks up the oxygen

articles.title: New Zealand bowl first, both teams make a change each

articles.title: [WATCH] Virat Kohli, Gautam Gambhir avoid interaction during nets ahead of first ODI
articles.description: Cameras at India's pre-series practice picked up no visible interaction between Virat Kohli and coach Gautam Gambhir, reviving questions about the pair's working relationship within the support staff.

articles.title: 'Every cricketer carries the dream of playing at Lord's' - Sachin Tendulkar on women's Test
articles.description: India's historic 270-run victory at Lord's signals women's cricket's remarkable growth.

articles.title: 3 potential replacements for Stephen Fleming as CSK head coach

articles.title: Should MS Dhoni take over as CSK's head coach after Stephen Fleming?
articles.description: With Fleming no longer the coach, the ideal step up for Dhoni would be to take up Kiwi's role from next year.

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: Abhishek Nayar backs Bumrah return, picks playing XI for first ODI

articles.title: Shaheen Afridi handed NOC for maiden Lanka Premier League stint; set to represent Kandy Royals
articles.description: The LPL is scheduled to be held from July 17 to August 8, with Kandy Royals beginning their campaign against Dambulla Sixers on July 18.

articles.title: 'I can only say sorry' - Brendon McCullum rues Test failues against India and Australia
articles.description: Recent results under the New Zealand skipper had waned in the red-ball game, with the Three Lions losing seven of their last nine Tests

articles.title: Ireland Women vs West Indies Women Prediction, 3rd ODI – Who will win today’s match between IRE W vs WI W?
articles.description: West Indies Women took an unassailable lead 2-0 in the three-match ODI series.
